title: Traditional Greek Loukoumades
description: Greek doughnuts deep-fried to perfection, drizzled with honey and sprinkled with cinnamon. These sweet treats are perfect for dessert or as a snack.
instructions: Heat the oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C (350°F).
Carefully drop the dough into the hot oil using a spoon, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the loukoumades for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the loukoumades from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Drizzle the loukoumades with honey and sprinkle with cinnamon.
Dust the loukoumades with powdered sugar and serve warm.
